_comment: Legs are keyed by the WAKE-UP location (where you are at the ~5am report time), not by flight day. Travel-day mornings belong to the island you slept on. Source: Notion 'Honeymoon' DB (flights CVG->LIH Jun 24, rental car Lihue Jun 24-Jul 2, Honolulu Airbnb Jul 2-4, Four Seasons Lanai Jul 4-9, Lanai->HNL->CVG Jul 9-10). After the last leg's end date the resolver returns null and the report falls back to the normal home (Ohio) config.

legs.note: Kauai County = the island of Kauai (Niihau has no public access). Region-wide live feed is effectively island-wide.
Honolulu County = the island of Oahu. Region-wide live feed is effectively island-wide.

eBird's smallest region containing Lanai is Maui County (US-HI-009), which bundles Maui. Per traveler instruction (no Lanai->Maui ferry), this leg uses a 13km radius around Lanai City so the live feed stays on Lanai and excludes Maui.
